meta.title: BodyMeal — AI-Powered Nutrition Tracker
meta.description: Track calories and macros effortlessly. Snap a photo — AI identifies the meal in seconds. 3,000,000+ products, statistics, personal plan.
meta.keywords: nutrition tracker, calorie counter, macros, AI food recognition, food diary, bodymeal
meta.ogDescription: Snap your food — get calories and macros in seconds. Free.

hero.subtitle: Snap a photo of your meal — AI identifies ingredients and calculates calories in seconds. Over 3,000,000 products in the database.

features.title: Everything for nutrition tracking
features.subtitle: From AI recognition to a personal plan — all the tools in one app

ai.title: AI photo recognition
ai.description: Take a photo of your meal and the AI identifies ingredients, calories, and macros in seconds.

multiInput.title: 5 input methods
multiInput.description: Camera, gallery, text, barcode scanner, or database search — choose what works for you.

plan.title: Personal nutrition plan
plan.description: Complete the onboarding and we'll calculate your daily calorie and macro targets based on your body and goals.

diary.title: Food diary
diary.description: Convenient diary with meal breakdowns, progress bars, and a weekly overview right on the home screen.

recipes.title: Custom products & recipes
recipes.description: Create your own products and recipes with automatic macro calculations per serving and per 100g.

stats.title: Statistics & charts
stats.description: Clear charts for the week and month. Track trends for calories, protein, fat, and carbs.

howItWorks.title: Three simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Start tracking your nutrition right now — it takes less than a minute

step1.title: Snap a photo
step1.description: Open the camera and take a photo. You can also pick from gallery or type the name.

step2.title: AI identifies the meal
step2.description: The neural network analyzes the photo, identifies ingredients, and calculates calories, protein, fat, and carbs.

step3.title: Track your progress
step3.description: Entries are added to your diary. View statistics by day, week, or month and follow your personal plan.

lifestyle.title: Healthy eating made simple
lifestyle.subtitle: Whether you're cooking at home, eating out, or grabbing a quick snack — BodyMeal fits into your daily routine. Track nutrition effortlessly without changing the way you live.
lifestyle.bullet1: Works with any diet or eating style
lifestyle.bullet2: Quick logging — under 10 seconds per meal
lifestyle.bullet3: Light and dark themes for comfort anytime

pricing.title: Start for free
pricing.subtitle: Try all features without limits for 3 days

items.q: How accurate is the AI food recognition?
items.a: The AI analyzes photos using the Gemini neural network and identifies ingredients with high accuracy. You can always edit the result before saving — adjust weight, composition, or add ingredients.
Yes! The food diary, local database search, and all core features work offline. Internet is only needed for AI photo recognition and cross-device sync.
The app is available in 6 languages: Russian, English, German, Spanish, French, and Portuguese. The language is detected automatically from your device settings.

items.q: Can I use it for free?
items.a: Yes, you get 10 free entries with no feature restrictions. For unlimited use, the Pro subscription is available with a 3-day free trial.
Your data is stored locally on your device. When signed in, data is encrypted and synced over a secure connection. We don't share data with third parties.

items.q: Where does the product data come from?
items.a: We use the OpenFoodFacts database with over 3 million products worldwide, plus our own curated database. Nutrition data is verified and regularly updated.

finalCta.title: Start tracking calories today
finalCta.subtitle: Download BodyMeal for free and take control of your nutrition. First 3 days of Pro — free.
finalCta.note: Android 8+. Free with optional Pro subscription.
